'''OnePlus Dominate Arena''' is a [[Battlegrounds Mobile India|BGMI]] tournament hosted by [[NODWIN Gaming]] and OnePlus

==About==
===Broadcast Talent===
{{broadcasterCard
|b1=kRaT
|b2=RagingMode|b2flag=in|b2name=Shubkaran R
}}

===Format===
*'''OnePlus Dominate Arena - January''' : ''January 29th - Febraury 1st
** 12 invited teams.
** 4 teams from Open Qualifiers.
** 4 matchdays.
** 20 matches (5 each day).
